assets.label: Generated PBR material atlas sets for Hero Street v2 surfaces
assets.licenseStatus: Project-generated synthetic PBR atlas sets; no source media copied.
notes: Includes mudbrick, plaster, dust, wood, linen, pottery, and skin atlas families.
Each family includes albedo, normal, roughness, AO, height, and packed MRAO maps for Babylon PBR use.
Materials are restrained for early Memphis / Old Kingdom street reconstruction: mudbrick, whitewash, plain linen, clay pottery, and dark wood.
